title: orchis × aurunca
intro: Orchis × aurunca is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Orchis mascula and Ophrys aurunca. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Orchis × aurunca include its ability to treat various conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve kidney function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat respiratory issues and skin problems.
